suggestions.topic: BAL DevNet 3 stability and EIP-8037 2D gas orphaned blocks issue
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 3 has critical consensus bugs with blocks exceeding gas limits in 2D accounting (ACDT #76). With April 1st launch target passed and Glamsterdam DevNet 0 scheduled for April 15, this is blocking forward progress.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0 launch readiness (BAL + ePBS merge)
suggestions.rationale: April 15 target (fallback April 22) approaching. External builder API testing required before merge, and both BAL DevNet 3 and ePBS DevNet 1 need stability confirmation. Critical path dependencies need coordination.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet 1 status and external builder API testing scope
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 1 launched March 31 with Alpha 4 spec. ACDT #76 decided external builder API must be tested in isolation before BAL+ePBS merge, but testing plan and success criteria not defined.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8136 (partial cells) inclusion decision for Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: Proposed for Glamsterdam inclusion in ACDT #76. Prysm/Lighthouse trunk-ready by end of April with 300K validator test planned. Needs ACD discussion per SFI process.

suggestions.topic: Blob DevNet 0 client readiness and GetBlobV3 stable releases
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #75 identified trunk branch instability with Nethermind/Erigon failing to stay at head. Stable releases with GetBlobV3 needed before broader testnet deployment.
ACDT #76 noted ETH/70 required if gas limit exceeds 80M, but optional for BAL DevNet 3. With Glamsterdam DevNet 0 scope locked, need final decision on inclusion and implementation timeline.

suggestions.topic: Beacon API PRs review status: proposal preference SSE (#593) and envelope creation (#584)
suggestions.rationale: Required for ePBS external builder implementation. CL teams assigned review in ACDT #76 with no follow-up. Blocking external builder API testing.
Action item from ACDT #76 to assign one person per EL team for 8037 coordination. May already be resolved via Discord/async channels, but worth quick confirmation.
